allow: PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($items\) { $items | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } } else { "EMPTY" }; if \(Test-Path "docs"\) { "DOCS_EXISTS" } else { "DOCS_MISSING" })

Bash(NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://example.supabase.co NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=dummy SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=dummy OLLAMA_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 OLLAMA_MODEL=gemma4:e4b npm.cmd run build)
Bash(NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://example.supabase.co NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=dummy SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=dummy OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-dummy OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini npm.cmd run build)

Bash(NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://example.supabase.co NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=dummy SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=dummy OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-dummy OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini CRON_TOKEN=dummy npm.cmd run build)

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env.local'}\); console.log\('openai:', process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY?'set \('+process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY.length+' chars\)':'missing'\); console.log\('ollama:', process.env.OLLAMA_API_BASE_URL || 'missing'\)")
